summary.recommendation: Best-method accuracy 85.9% within 80-95% band. Refinement has converged (3-iteration cap + iter-3 revert). Remaining failures are framework limits; proceed to Export.

comparison.strengths: Post-refinement best method (85.9%, kappa 0.753 substantial). Handles Perception Gate rescues (T020, T021 pass) and correctly resolves IDS1, ra1/ra2, BIF1 GOF, and FEA4/ABPH2 cascade after the refinement fixes.
comparison.weaknesses: Residual dilution for weak-KD (T042) and exogenous-CK treatment (T062, T063) — signal washed across 4+ step cascades. Non-monotonic dosage (T045, T076, T026) and Trap 5 rescue (T022, T023) are framework limits.

comparison.strengths: Hill nonlinearity cleanly amplifies strong perturbations; +4.2 pp gain over baseline after refinement.
comparison.weaknesses: Hill saturation caps OE signals (T064 KNR6 OE unchanged). Method-specific IDS1 residual at T036/T038 despite iter-2 edge removal. Same framework limits as Algebraic.

comparison.strengths: Tied second-best (80.3%). Recovers some KRN-QTL downstream tests that ODE misses.
comparison.weaknesses: Signed-diffusion leaks exogenous peptide through receptor-null backgrounds (T020-T023 all fail). Flips ra1/ra2 direction (T029, T030).
